name: Pistachio Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
2. Mix until well combined, then beat at medium speed for 4 minutes.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased and floured 13x9 inch pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes or until the cake springs back when lightly pressed.
5. Allow to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before removing it.
6. Finish cooling on a wire rack.
7. Sprinkle with confectioner's sugar if desired.
